Case# CWErr.cwUnsupportedRSNVersionErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwUnsupportedRSNVersionErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwunsupportedrsnversionerr#Discussion)

Invalid WPA/WPA2 version specified.
